data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a referral leaderboard/gamification, but the evidence provided does not confirm its implementation. While the use case describes a referral program and mentions tracking of referrals, it lacks specific details or endpoints that demonstrate the existence of a leaderboard or gamification features. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement as the evidence does not support the presence of the necessary functionality.
gaps: No evidence of a referral leaderboard or gamification features.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
